evals.prompt: Deploy my Claude Agent SDK chat app to AgentCore
evals.expected_output: Skill runs Phase 1 (Analysis), detects language, SDK, framework, store, and presents analysis report before proceeding.
expectations: Detects Claude Agent SDK import in the project
Identifies the web framework (Express, FastAPI, etc.)
Maps the conversation store type (in-memory, DB, etc.)
Identifies WebSocket or SSE setup
Presents analysis report and asks for confirmation before Phase 2

evals.prompt: Add AgentCore Memory to my agent for persistent conversation storage
evals.expected_output: Skill generates memory-client, memory-store, store router, and modifies session module to inject STM history + LTM context.
expectations: Creates memory-client module with STM and LTM helpers
Creates memory-store module matching the original store interface
Creates store router with AGENTCORE_MEMORY_ID feature flag
Modifies session/agent module to load bounded STM history
Modifies session/agent module to search LTM for cross-session context
Adds @aws-sdk/client-bedrock-agentcore dependency

evals.prompt: I want to migrate my Python FastAPI chat agent to AWS AgentCore
evals.expected_output: Skill detects Python/FastAPI, generates Python-specific templates for all AgentCore components.
expectations: Detects Python language and FastAPI framework
Generates runtime_server.py with FastAPI patterns
Generates memory_client.py using boto3
Generates auth.py with JWT decoding
Generates deploy.sh with pip-based dependency installation
Adds boto3 to requirements.txt

evals.prompt: Generate a deployment script for my AgentCore app
evals.expected_output: Generates a complete deploy.sh with all AgentCore setup steps and --destroy support.
expectations: Script includes prerequisites check
Script includes agentcore configure step
Script includes Cognito setup
Script includes JWT authorizer configuration
Script includes Memory resource creation with semantic strategy
Script includes agentcore deploy with environment variables
Script includes .env file generation
Script supports --destroy flag for teardown
If frontend detected, includes S3 + CloudFront deployment

evals.prompt: Transform my chat app to use AgentCore and generate tests
evals.expected_output: After transformation, generates tests/agentcore-test.sh with auth, CRUD, WebSocket, and Memory verification tests.
expectations: Test script authenticates via Cognito
Test script creates and lists chats via /invocations
Test script verifies unauthenticated requests are rejected
Test script tests WebSocket connectivity (if websocat available)
Test script verifies Memory resource is active
Test script cleans up test data
Test script prints pass/fail summary
Test script supports --endpoint flag for different targets

evals.prompt: Deploy to AgentCore but skip the frontend deployment
evals.expected_output: Skill respects user's request to skip frontend, generates backend-only deployment.
expectations: Asks for confirmation in Phase 2 plan
Skips CloudFormation template generation
Skips CloudFront Function generation
deploy.sh has HAS_FRONTEND=false
No S3 sync or CloudFront invalidation steps
